# NextGen Interiors & Architects

> NextGen Interiors & Architects is a leading interior design and architecture firm based in Baluwatar, Kathmandu, Nepal, delivering 200+ residential, commercial and hospitality projects across Nepal. Services span interior design, architecture, house design, hotel and resort design, commercial fit-outs, workplace design, DPR and landscaping.

## Contact

- Location: Baluwatar, Kathmandu, Nepal
- Phone: +977 9849151220
- Email: info@nextgeninterior.com
- Service area: All over Nepal

## Services

- [Interior Design](https://nextgeninterior.com/interiors): Interior designer in Kathmandu - luxury interiors, home and office interior design, turnkey interior solutions and interior decoration.
- [Architecture](https://nextgeninterior.com/architecture): Architecture firm in Kathmandu - residential architecture, facades and commercial building design across Nepal.
- [Residential Design](https://nextgeninterior.com/residential): House and home design in Kathmandu - modern homes, luxury residences and neo-classical designs.
- [Hospitality Design](https://nextgeninterior.com/hospitality): Hotel and resort designer in Nepal - hospitality interiors, banquet and restaurant design, hotel consulting.
- [Commercial Design](https://nextgeninterior.com/commercial): Commercial building designer in Kathmandu - offices, retail, restaurants and mixed-use spaces.
- [Workplace Design](https://nextgeninterior.com/workplace): Office interior designer in Kathmandu - modern office and corporate workspace design.
- [DPR & Landscaping](https://nextgeninterior.com/dpr-landscaping): Detailed Project Reports, master-planning, garden and landscape design.
